tuning: E A D G B E
content:
i saw a bunch of tabs for this song and theyre all wrong! hahaha! theyre in the 
wrong key anyway. The key's in F, so i thought i'd transpose it for everyone.
I pray that God may touch your life like He did mine! Jesus LOOOOVVVEESSS you!!!

No Capo

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                                              [ch]Em7[/ch]
Picture perfect memories scattered all around the floor[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                                            [ch]Em7[/ch]
Reachin for the phone cause I can't fight it anymore[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                                [ch]Em7[/ch]
And I wonder if I ever crossed your mind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
For me it happens all the time[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                              [ch]Bm[/ch]
It's a quarter after one, I'm all alone and I need you now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
Said I wouldn't call but I lost all control and I need you now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And I don't know how I can do without[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I just need you now[/tab]

[ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]

Thanks!!! Please rate this! God Bless!! Love ya!
